repo.description: [CVPR 2023] Unifying Short and Long-Term Tracking with Graph Hierarchies

terms.context_snippet: [22.12.2024] Check out our follow-up work [SPAM](https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-3-031-73254-6_22) [ECCV 2024]!
